description: Square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed hands against a dark torso. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'WASHINGTON' in white serif capitals. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line '2/9/2025 | Washington, DC.' The name is in white bold sans-serif: 'Mario Reyes-Flores.' Below is a 'CRIMES:' label with bulleted charges 'Hit and run' and 'DUI.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark are at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box is at bottom right.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/9/2025 | Washington, DC; Mario Reyes-Flores; CRIMES: Hit and run, DUI; WASHINGTON; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
